description:
Get my free 5-day email series (what I used to help build a $25M+ startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/agcc

In this video, I break down the ways Anthropic's Growth Team used Claude Code to help them grow from $1 billion to $19 billion in 14 months, the fastest growth in tech history. I studied their entire growth team and pulled out the 4 strategies they keep coming back to with Claude Code, plus the one ceiling most people hit that turns AI into more work instead of leverage.

Timestamps:
(0:00) - How Anthropic ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code to Grow
(0:28) - Strategy 1: Automating Existing Workflows
(3:05) - Strategy 2: Sub-Threshold Work Now Worth Doing 
(5:36) - Strategy 3: Build Tools Only You Would Ever Build
(9:18) - Strategy 4: AI as Thought Partner

--------
FOR INDIVIDUALS:
- Free 5-day playbook on building AI systems that compound (the system behind an 8-figure startup): https://the-ai-playbook.com/agcc
- Use BuildPartner to build 10x faster with Claude Code (try free): https://buildpartner.ai/agcc

FOR BUSINESSES, Ways to work with me:
- Want AI systems built into your operations? https://theincubator.xyz/ops/agcc
-  Want to build a SaaS product without hiring a CTO? https://www.theincubator.xyz/eng/agcc
--------

If you're new here, I'm Austin Marchese. How I got here...
16: First business (SAT Math Tutor)
22: Graduated Stevens Tech, 4.0, College Basketball, software engineering job at JPM
23: Bitcoin ATM company + building algorithms for a professional gambler (fun story)
24: Started creating content, grew 100k+ followers, built first agency, The Incubator
25: Scaled agency to 15+ team members, $75K/M while working full time
26: Quit my job, joined a startup called IYK
27: Became COO of a $25M+ tech startup, worked with Ed Sheeran, Chance the Rapper and more
28: Built a $20M+ real estate portfolio in the background
29: Transitioned from IYK, re-launched The Incubator, grew it to a 6-figure biz in 30 days. Now building BuildPartner.ai

To everyone who's spending time learning and putting the work in, cheers. Anyone can make comments from the sidelines but not everyone can build...

- Austin

Follow/Subscribe

- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/austin.marchese/
- Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/@austin.marchese
